info.title: Health Gorilla FHIR R4 API
info.description: Health Gorilla's FHIR R4 REST API provides comprehensive healthcare data interoperability including patient clinical data (Patient, AllergyIntolerance, Condition, Observation, Procedure, Encounter, Immunization), medications and care management (MedicationRequest, MedicationDispense, MedicationStatement, CarePlan, Goal, NutritionOrder, DeviceUseStatement, Consent, Coverage, FamilyMemberHistory), documents and results (ElectronicFax, DocumentReference, DiagnosticReport, Composition, Bundle), orders and fulfillment (ServiceRequest, RequestGroup), events and delivery (InstantMessage, Webhooks), and provider/organization management.

get.description: Retrieve a specific Patient resource by its ID
Search for Patient resources using FHIR search parameters
Retrieve all resources related to a specific Patient

post.description: Export patient data as a C-CDA (Consolidated Clinical Document Architecture) document
